title: Validate TDMA against ccp_tdma.json test vectors and update docs
description: Add or update tests in lichen/tests/ or zephyr tests to verify hash slot calc, timing windows, guard=100ms against test/vectors/ccp_tdma.json and ccp16.json. Update comments in link.h, link_ctx.c, Kconfig to reference exact spec sections. Fix any remaining mismatches.
